Field.displayName: Select this checkbox to create a new Identity in Ascension Access Management.
Field.helpKey: The checkbox above should be used when none of the Identities listed in the "Contractor Name" drop down correspond to the individual you are attempting to onboard.
Field.name: creationCheckbox

Script.Source: return "<font size='2' color='red'>Note: This user already exists in Ascension Access Management (AAM) in active status. Kindly use the 'Modify Associate/Contractor' form under the 'Manage Identity' option on your AAM dashboard to further modify details for the user.</font>";
